allow: Bash(node -e 'const { PrismaClient } = require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.project.findFirst\(\).then\(r => console.log\('\\''DB OK:'\\'', JSON.stringify\(r\)?.slice\(0,100\)\)\).catch\(e => console.log\('\\''DB ERROR:'\\'', e.message\)\).finally\(\(\) => p.$disconnect\(\)\)')
